_description: LoC ceilings for files being actively shrunk by the thin-harness refactor. Phase 0 captures current sizes as the STARTING point; subsequent phases tighten the ceilings. CI fails if any file exceeds its current ceiling.
_seed_instructions: To regenerate: WRITE_LOC_BUDGET=1 pnpm vitest run test/refactor-phase0.test.ts

phase_targets._comment: Target LoC after each phase completes. Not enforced; documentation of intent.

_post_hygiene_note: Memory-feature commit 65fc955 added ~200 lines to tools.ts and raised the ceiling to 7917 without a -fixture-bump label. Hygiene PR extracted sessionSearch/memoryHealth/curatedMemoryHandler to memory-tools.ts (recovering 116 of those lines) and ratcheted the ceiling down to the new measured value 7801. The remaining 85 lines vs. Phase 0 (7716) are the memory feature's unavoidable dispatch + telemetry scaffolding. Phases 8/9 still target further reduction.
